titleStmt.title: SII 30.125: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 125. (A.R. No. 203 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīsvarā temple-on the north wall King name not mentioned: Saka 830: 908 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription registers the gift of 12 kaḻañju of gold for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity Tiruppōndaip-perumāṉaḍigaḷ at Rājamallach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam of Tiruvēgambapuram by certain Kāri Ilāḍatitaṉ, who belongs to Iṉṉambar-nāḍu situated in the northern bank of Chōḷa-nāḍu. This gift was left in charge of Gaṇapperumakkaḷ of the temple to burn this lamp with the interest of the above-mentioned gold.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīcakara yāṇṭu Eṇṇūṟṟu muppatu tiruvekampapuṟattu Irājamalla ccaturvveti maṅkala
ttut tiruppontaip perumāṉaṭikaḷukkuc coḻanāṭṭu vaṭakarai Iṉṉampar nāṭṭu
ṭṭāṉ kāri Ilāṭatittaṉeṉ vaitta nantā viḷakku Oṉṟukkuṅ kuṭutta Ūrkkaṟcemmaipoṉ pan
niru kaḻañcaraiyālum vanta vṛddhikoṇṭu Ipperumāṉaṭikaḷ kaṇap perumakkaḷārāṉa candra
tami nan=tāviḷakkoṉṟu merippippārkaḷāka vaitteṉ Iddharmmam rakṣittāraṭi yeṉmuṭime
Iddharmmattukku Ahitam veṇṭuvār kaṅkaiyiṭaik kumari Iṭaic ceytār ceyta pāvamaṭuvār ..
Digital edition of SII 30.125 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
